"We want to make sure that the MyŠkoda app is the best it can be.
To help us understand how our users interact with it, we gather data using tools such as Google Analytics. By allowing us to track your activities, you will help us improve the app.

A Driving score rates your driving based on the 6 criteria below. The better your driving, the higher your score.

"Accelerate gradually to maintain complete control of your vehicle and optimise fuel or battery efficiency. Avoid rapid or forceful acceleration, which can cause loss of traction, particularly on wet, icy, or slippery surfaces.
A smooth increase in speed supports vehicle stability, reduces mechanical wear, and ensures a safer driving environment for all road users.
Tip: Pay special attention to your surroundings before accelerating, especially when merging or overtaking, to move forward safely."

"Smooth braking ensures safety and comfort. Apply gentle, steady pressure to the brake pedal, avoiding abrupt or harsh braking. Always scan the road ahead, and start slowing down early to prevent sudden stops. This approach reduces the risk of losing control and gives other drivers more time to react.
Tip: Maintain a safe following distance of at least 2 seconds behind the vehicle ahead. Doing so will allow you enough time to respond safely if traffic conditions change suddenly. In emergencies, apply full and firm brake pressure immediately."

"To maintain alertness and reduce fatigue, take breaks at least every 2 hours. Short pauses help restore focus, prevent stiffness, and reduce the risk of accidents caused by drowsiness.
Tip: During breaks, stretch, hydrate, and rest your eyes by looking at distant objects. For safety reasons, avoid driving for more than 8–10 hours in a single day."

"Regularly check your fuel or battery levels, especially before long journeys. When levels drop below 25%, refuelling or charging is recommended to prevent unpleasant surprises.
Always plan routes to include petrol or charging stations so that you are prepared for traffic delays or unexpected detours.
Tip: Keep a basic emergency kit (including a phone charger, blanket, and water) in your car in case you run low on fuel or get stuck in a traffic jam."
Fuel and battery: ensure sufficient reserves

"Visibility decreases at dusk, dawn, and nighttime. Reduce your speed and get used to lower visibility and the glare from oncoming headlights. In rural or forested areas watch out for animals crossing the road, especially in marked zones.
During peak traffic periods, expect sudden stops and unpredictable lane changes. Maintain a safe following distance, avoid aggressive driving, and always yield to emergency vehicles.
Tip: Clean your windscreen and headlights regularly to maximise visibility during night driving or low-light conditions."
Night driving and heavy traffic: extra caution required

"Higher speeds require longer stopping distances and reduce reaction time, increasing the risk of accidents. Consider your speed and that of other road users — large differences can create hazardous situations. Always adhere to posted speed limits.
Tip: Adjust your speed to the current road conditions (heavy traffic, weather, etc.) to maintain safe reaction times."

"Your vehicle is registered in a fleet and managed by a fleet operator (e.g. your company or employer). The fleet operator is responsible for processing and transferring vehicle data (e.g. geolocation data and maintenance data). The fleet operator has the authority to restrict or override your selected privacy mode settings in the vehicle. In such cases, the data will be transferred to the fleet operator regardless of the current privacy mode settings.
For more information about the data processing when the vehicle is registered in a fleet, please contact your fleet operator."

"Please note — by submitting feedback, you agree that our customer support team may contact you by email or phone.
This will help us get the most out of your feedback."
We would love to hear your feedback — it could help us improve the app.
Thank you for your feedback. You are helping us improve our app.

"Now, an even better map experience!
> Chargers load much faster
> You can display up to 1,000 pins at a time
> When you zoom out, pins near each other will cluster together
Your car data loads much faster too — with a timestamp showing when it was loaded."

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Test drive** Schedule your test drive with MyŠkoda in just a few taps.
* **Redesigned maps** Our new-look maps make planning your trip even easier.
* **Expanded Pay to Park** Thanks to increased coverage, you can find more parking spaces and pay for them with MyŠkoda. "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Exterior temperature** Helps you decide when to use auxiliary heating (for supported vehicles only).
* **Car states (online, standby, etc.)** Now always available at a glance.
* **Route details redesign** Key information is easier to read thanks to a new, fresher layout.
* **Marketing consent** Don’t miss out! For all the latest news and updates, please confirm your consent and country of residence. "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Charging statistics** You can now track your charging session history (Elroq/Enyaq).
* **Trip planner** You can now set Powerpass-compatible charging stations as preferred on your route (Elroq/Enyaq).
* **Refresh** Update data with a new pull-down feature.
* **Driver challenges** Become a greener driver and win digital badges! "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Trip planning with AI** Discover and explore new destinations with Škoda Adventurer, powered by AI.
* **Driving score** Get rated on your driving skills and become a safer driver.
* **Contacting us** We want to make things easier for you! Therefore, we’ve updated and simplified our process for sharing feedback and reporting issues with your car. "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Feature 1** Detail description.
* **Feature 2** Detail description.
* **Feature 3** Detail description.
* **Feature 4** Detail description. "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Maps enhancements** * Display the route on a map when you're adding a stopover. * See user ratings of chargers (reviews can be given only in the car’s Infotainment System).
* **Driving Data** View details of a single trip (for vehicles with the Driving Data service).
* **Accident Damage Management** Alert your service partner to vehicle damage (Available in DE, IT, FR, CH, IE, PT, IC, ES, PL). "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Laura — your AI companion** Laura makes trip planning even easier. Get tailored route suggestions, with chargers and points of interest, and see them all in Maps. "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Guest users** Now they can remotely operate functions such as vehicle status, lock/unlock and Honk & Flash (except Fabia, Scala and Kamiq vehicles with 8” Infotainment).
* **Charging locations** Can be added by users with 5.4+ software.
* **Departure timers in charging locations** You can tell your car to automatically preheat the cabin while the vehicle is in immediate charging mode. "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **2G & 3G Sunset** As of 1 January 2026, these networks will be shut down in Iceland, Sweden, and Switzerland — please check MyŠkoda for details.
* **Laura in Maps** You can now ask Laura to refine your searches, e.g. you want to find other points of interest or better-rated restaurants. "

"Here's what is new in this version:
* **Battery charging** Charging Location — more key information displayed in the Car section. "

"The amount charged shown here may slightly differ from the actual data.
Charging is never 100% efficient (there is always a small amount of energy loss).
The difference could also be due to additional energy needs, e.g. climate control."
You may see differences in the energy reported in your Charging History compared to other apps. This can happen due to factors like AC to DC conversion or using climate features.
Using an external charging source for climate control does not alter the battery level. However, this can also impact energy consumption.
This also applies to external charging for battery temperature preconditioning.

"You may see differences in the energy reported in your Charging History compared to other apps. This can happen due to factors like AC to DC conversion or using climate features.

# About the digital assistant Laura uses systems based on artificial intelligence (e.g. large language models). These help to bundle large volumes of information, support the understanding of questions and wording of answers and help with other functionalities, such as navigation within the app. ## Please take into account - AI content is not verified by a human and may contain errors - Questions that directly concern the safety of persons in the vehicle will not be answered using AI and you will be transferred directly to another source of information - Do not enter any sensitive or personal information
Laura uses AI to reply, so please double-check important details.

Prices vary depending on the charging point operator and charging speed. They may include fixed fees (e.g. a session fee), price per kWh, or time-based fees. Charges may vary during the day. For pricing details, see the details of the relevant charging station in the Maps section.

A fixed price applies at all Ionity charging stations. Prices vary depending on the charging point operator and charging connector. They may include fixed fees (e.g. a session fee), price per kWh, or time-based fees. Prices may vary during the day. For pricing details, see the details of the relevant charging station in the Maps section.

"Prices at charging stations not operated by IONITY network members are billed by Volkswagen Group Charging GmbH (Elli) on behalf of the station operator.
Prices are billed individually, based on kWh, session length, or time of day, or any combination of them. Some operators may apply standing charges.
Before charging, you can check an operator's charging prices in the IONITY app. When charging abroad, an exchange fee may be subsequently applied."

Solar power forecasting has been selected, but the charging trigger has not been activated due to surplus photovoltaic energy.
Solar power forecasting is based on weather forecast data and your photovoltaic system. Using the charging trigger, we optimise the charging time based on future solar power forecasts.
To enable this function, open your photovoltaic system and adjust your photovoltaic connection.
To use forecast charging, you will first need to install a photovoltaic system.

If your photovoltaic system produces more electricity than your household consumes, a surplus is generated. Instead of feeding this excess energy into the public energy grid, it can be transferred to the battery.

Treat yourself to a gift from the original Škoda collection while waiting for your vehicle. On [the e-shop](%s), you can also purchase Škoda Genuine Accessories, from roof boxes to winter complete wheels and car mats. Shipping to authorized Škoda partners is free.
[Choose the right accessories](%s) to enhance your Škoda experience when exploring.

Details make the difference. For this reason, in [Škoda Original Accessories](%s) catalogue you will find a complete range of Accessories with highest quality. Choose the ones that fit you the best: they will become the perfect complement for your vehicle.
You can order them in advance from your Škoda dealer and take them with you on the day of delivery.
Ready for any adventure! Whether you want to carry bikes, transport extra luggage, or drive safely through the winter, we have the right accessories for your car. Discover them [here](%s).
Are you prepared for the season, or do you need to add any new accessories? Check out what is available in our [Accessories shop](%s).

Most Škoda vehicles come with a limited warranty. To extend your coverage, check out our [extended warranty package](%s).
Most Škoda vehicles come with a limited warranty. If you want to extend your coverage, you have time until delivery to purchase a [extended factory warranty](%s).

Extend your warranty and avoid unexpected service costs. With the purchase of a new vehicle, simply request the [Škoda Extended Warranty](%s) supplemental service and instead of 2 years, you will be covered for up to 5 years. Depending on your preference, there are multiple options available.
Most Škoda vehicles come with a 2-year limited warranty. To extend your coverage, check out our [extended warranty](%s) package.
Most Škoda vehicles come with a 3-year limited warranty. To extend your coverage, check out our [extended warranty](%s) package.
Most Škoda vehicles come with a 3-year limited warranty. To extend your coverage, check out our [extended warranty](%s) package.
All new Škoda vehicles come with a 3-year unlimited mileage warranty. To extend your cover, check out our [extended warranty package](%s).
Most Škoda vehicles come with a limited warranty. To extend your coverage, check out our [extended warranty package](%s).
Most Škoda vehicles come with a 4-year limited warranty/90,000 km maximum. To extend your coverage, check out our extended warranty package.
Škoda vehicles come with a standard 3-year warranty (60,000 km maximum). To extend your coverage via the Premium Care Service Package, visit our [website](%s).

Before your car arrives, it is important to review the checklist below:
If you are exchanging or trading in your current Škoda please bring along your spare keys and Vehicle License Certificate for the vehicle you are exchanging.
If you are exchanging or trading in your current Škoda please bring along your spare keys and Vehicle License Certificate for the vehicle you are exchanging.
Concerts, events, discounts and special information: welcome to the world of Škoda. Register now: a small car is waiting for you, while you wait for the real one. Join the [Club Škoda](%s).
Concerts, events, discounts and special information: welcome to the world of Škoda. Register now: a small car is waiting for you, while you wait for the real one. Join the [Club Škoda](%s).

"Once you have activated your car, you can use services and features in this app (such as remotely controlling your vehicle or getting the current vehicle status).
When can I start? The activation option is displayed on the home screen of your MyŠkoda app, which you can complete during the delivery of your vehicle. Find out more about [Škoda Connect](%s)."

"Once you've activated your car, you will be able to use services and features in this app (such as remotely controlling your vehicle or getting the latest vehicle status).
When can I begin? The activation option will appear on your app's homescreen — which you can finish after car collection. Learn more about [Škoda Connect](%s)."
Have you already prepared for [Škoda Connect](%s)? Download the MyŠkoda app now and get ready for your vehicle. You can find out what the Connect services offer you in the [availability list](%s).

Once you activate [Škoda Connect](%s) services, you expand the possibilities of your vehicle. The services are divided into logical thematic packages: Infotainment Online (expansion of infotainment functions), Proactive Service (facilitation of car maintenance), and Remote Access (access to the vehicle remotely). The MyŠkoda application serves as the assistant for the entire Škoda Connect services.

Once the [connectivity](%s) activation is ready, you will see a step-by-step enrolment guideline in the App. To complete activation, simply carry out the final step of the process in your car after pickup.

"Once you've activated your car, you will be able to use services and features in this app (such as remotely controlling your vehicle or getting the latest vehicle status).
When can I begin? The activation option will appear on your app's homescreen — which you can finish after car collection. [See more about Škoda Connect](%s)."

[When can I begin?](%s) The activation option will appear on your app's homescreen - which you can finish after car collection. "

"Once you've activated your car, you will be able to use services and features in this app. You can control everything remotely, from locking and unlocking, to blink and honk features to find your car, and even how you want to charge the battery. When can I begin? The activation option will appear on your app's homescreen - which you can finish after car collection. "

Did you know that with your electric Škoda, you receive a free electric driving training session? During this one-on-one session, you will discover all the smart features of your car, such as the infotainment system, driving assistance systems, and useful tips for charging and trip planning. After the delivery of your Škoda, you will receive an email invitation to sign up. If you have not received an email after delivery or cannot find a suitable date, please contact VVGN at [0320 783 001](%s) or [skoda@verkeersveiligheidgroep.nl](%s).
[Škoda offers financing](%s) tailored to your needs. Try our [financing calculator](%s) to learn more about terms, purchase prices, and down payment options.
If you are availing of Finance for your new vehicle please remember to bring along some identification (driving license or passport) as well as a utility bill from the last 3 months.

"Škoda offers various charging options. Whether you're on the road or at home, you'll find the right solution. Feel free to find out about public charging options and the possibility of charging at home."
Škoda offers various charging options. Whether on the road or at home, you can find the right solution. Check out the public or home charging options.

Škoda offers various charging options. Whether on the road or at home, you can find the right solution. Please feel free to check charging cards, the public charging options and the option of charging at home. Also check whether you can make use of subsidies for the installation of a wallbox at your place of residence.

"Are you the direct owner of the vehicle? Then take advantage of the [Powerpass](%s) card, which allows you to charge your vehicle practically anywhere throughout Europe. You can choose from 3 tariffs based on the frequency of public charging, and all information on charging and payments will be available to you in a clear mobile application.
Do you have a company vehicle? The [Chargee](%s) card offers a comprehensive electric mobility solution for fleet customers with electrified vehicles and their own charging solutions, including settlement (home, corporate, and public charging) and other services suitable for the operation of corporate fleets in the Chargee mobile application and web interface for fleet managers.
Charging at home is easy thanks to [eMobility](%s) packages that include various types of support from Škoda Auto. From checking your home circuits (Home Check) to installing home wallboxes - Škoda iV Chargers - to purchasing and installing photovoltaic panels, battery storage, and other components to ensure the highest possible energy self-sufficiency for the client."

"Škoda offers various charging options. Whether on the road or at home, you can find the right solution.
Public charging? [Powerpass](%s) is compatible with most public charging providers.
Home charging? The [Škoda iV Charger](%s) is designed to charge your Škoda at home or work."

"Whether you're looking for subscription-based charging, a home charging box, or the nearest charging station for your Škoda, [Clever is your obvious choice](%s).
Dreaming of a self-drive holiday in Europe with your electric car? With [Powerpass](%s), you get access to one of the largest public charging networks (over 630,000 charging stations)."

Škoda offers various charging options. Whether on the road or at home, you can find the right solution. Public charging? Powerpass is compatible with most public charging providers. Home charging? The [Škoda Prepaid Service](%s) supplemental service saves you the worries and expenses associated with servicing your vehicle. It covers regular service inspections, oil and filter changes, and depending on the selected version, also the replacement of parts subject to normal wear and tear. You can prepay for the service for 5 years or according to selected mileage, but please note that it can only be purchased for a vehicle before the first service inspection within 2 years of being put into operation (whichever comes first).
We all use our cars in different ways, so we offer different types of [service and repair subscriptions for your Škoda](%s).

[Service & Maintenance Agreement](%s) makes your car a value investment. With it, you ensure the best resale value for your new car. For a monthly fee, you get the right to have your car serviced and repaired at any authorized Škoda Service partner in Finland without any extra charge. A list of all Škoda Service partners can be found [here](%s).
Customise our [Premium Care Services Package](%s) by choosing the timeframe and mileage limit.

Live your Škoda to the fullest without worrying about periodic maintenance. Subscribe to one of our Extended Drive maintenance plans and avoid price fluctuations and extra costs. Learn more about [Extended Drive](%s).
If you appreciate a hassle-free and comfortable life with your Skoda, you can add a [Service agreement](%s). By paying a monthly fee, the cost is covered once it’s time for the service of your car.

"With the Škoda Plus warranty, which is standard in Austria, you are already well covered for 5 years/100,000 km. If you would like to have a higher coverage of the manufacturer's warranty in terms of mileage or duration, please contact your Škoda dealer."

Škoda cars come with a 2-year warranty together with Škoda genuine spare parts and accessories. High-voltage batteries for fully electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles are granted 8 years or 160 000 km, depending on which limit is reached first. You can find more information on our [warranty webpage](%s).

"With the Škoda Plus warranty, which is standard in Austria, you are already well covered for 5 years/100,000 km. If you would like to have a higher coverage of the manufacturer's warranty in terms of mileage or duration, please contact your Škoda dealer."

"Please do not charge or drive your car until the update has been completed. Some of the vehicle settings may reset.
You can check the progress of the car software update in your vehicle’s Infotainment System, where you will complete the update once it is finished.
Please note that the app will not notify you when the update is finished."

"Škoda Connect services are now disabled — the 12V battery limit for remote services has been reached (the 12V battery starts your vehicle and powers remote communication).
To maintain vital car functions, your vehicle has switched off remote communication.
You can reset the limit by driving your car.
If this issue persists, please contact your service partner. "
